ground_truth_steps.description: Generate the referral document using the registered information
Review the document for accuracy and completeness

response_steps.description: Select the correct patient record and confirm the referral details.

step_mappings.explanation: Response step 2 combines the action of selecting the correct patient information (which is part of generating the document using registered information) and confirming/reviewing those details for accuracy and completeness. The ground truth separates these into two distinct steps.

response_steps.description: Click 'Print' to generate the referral document on the connected printer.

step_mappings.explanation: Both steps describe the core action of initiating the physical printing of the referral document. The ground truth provides a general instruction, while the response specifies the system interaction ('Click 'Print'') and the outcome ('generate... on the connected printer').

unmatched_response_steps.description: Navigate to the 'Print Referral' option in the HIS.
unmatched_response_steps.reason: This is a system navigation step that serves as a prerequisite to the core process steps described in the ground truth. The ground truth focuses on the actions of document generation, review, and printing, assuming the user is already in the correct system context.

unmatched_response_steps.description: Retrieve the printed document from the printer and hand it to the patient.
unmatched_response_steps.reason: This step describes post-printing physical handling and delivery of the document, which falls outside the scope of the ground truth's focus on the digital generation and printing action itself.
